subcodes.first_line: O thou who prostrateth thyself before the Court of the Ancient Beauty! Prostration is proof of the absence of existence, which is to say, lowliness and self-effacement and utter nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ساجد درگاه جمال قدم سجود دلیل فقدان وجوداست یعنی خاکساری و محویت و فنا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
